_comment: Copy this file to ~/.claude/chat-watch/chats.json and edit. Personal data (chat IDs, prompts that name colleagues) MUST NOT be checked into the repo.

_field_docs.label: Short identifier — used for state-<label>.json filename and for --chat <label> CLI arg. Must be unique. Keep it ASCII / filesystem-safe.
_field_docs.service: Chat service: 'teams' (default if omitted) or 'whatsapp'. Determines which adapter handles this chat.
_field_docs.id: Service-specific chat identifier. Teams: the long '19:...@thread.v2' string. WhatsApp: the JID (e.g. '120363...@g.us' for groups, '306912345678@s.whatsapp.net' for DMs).
_field_docs.prompt_template: Path to the gating prompt for this chat. Relative paths resolve against the directory containing chats.json.
_field_docs.max_replies_per_hour: Hard cap on replies in a rolling 60-minute window. Suggested: 5 for active group chats, 2 for 1:1s.
_field_docs.per_thread_cooldown_minutes: After replying to a message, wait this long before replying to the same thread again. Suggested: 10 for groups, 30 for 1:1s.
_field_docs.dry_run: If true, log decisions but post nothing. Useful while tuning a new prompt before going live.
_field_docs.service_config: Optional object with adapter-specific settings. WhatsApp: { 'db_path': '...', 'api_url': 'http://localhost:8080' }. Teams: not needed.
